del:       (fun x : ℝ => 2 * ((x / 2) * Real.exp (- (x / 2)))) := by
del:     ext x
del:     ring_nf
del:   rw [this]
del:   have h1 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => x / 2) atTop atTop := tendsto_id.atTop_div_const zero_lt_two
del:   have h2 : Tendsto (fun y : ℝ => y * Real.exp (-y)) atTop (nhds 0) := by
del:     have h := Real.tendsto_pow_mul_exp_neg_atTop_nhds_zero 1
del:     simp at h
del:     exact h
del:   have h3 := h2.comp h1
del:   have h4 := Tendsto.const_mul 2 h3
del:   simp at h4
del:   exact h4
add:   have tendsto_np_atTop : Tendsto (fun n : ℕ => (n : ℝ) * p n) atTop atTop := by
add:     rcases halpha with ⟨C, hC⟩
add:     have h1 : Tendsto (fun n : ℕ => Real.log (n : ℝ) + C) atTop atTop := by
add:       exact tendsto_atTop_add_const_right atTop C tendsto_log_natCast_atTop
add:     apply tendsto_atTop_mono' atTop _ h1
add:     filter_upwards [hC] with n hn
add:     linarith
context:
del: lemma tendsto_n_div_log_sq_atTop : Tendsto (fun (n : ℕ) => (n : ℝ) / (Real.log (n : ℝ)) ^ 2) atTop atTop := by
del:   sorry
add:   have tendsto_x_mul_exp_neg_half_x : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => x * Real.exp (-x / 2)) atTop (nhds 0) := by
add:     have h_eq : (fun x : ℝ => x * Real.exp (-x / 2)) = (fun x : ℝ => 2 * ((x / 2) * Real.exp (- (x / 2)))) := by
add:       ext x
add:       ring_nf
add:     rw [h_eq]
add:     have h1 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => x / 2) atTop atTop := tendsto_id.atTop_div_const zero_lt_two
add:     have h2 : Tendsto (fun y : ℝ => y * Real.exp (-y)) atTop (nhds 0) := by
add:       have h := Real.tendsto_pow_mul_exp_neg_atTop_nhds_zero 1
add:       simp at h
add:       exact h
add:     have h3 := h2.comp h1
add:     have h4 := Tendsto.const_mul 2 h3
add:     simp at h4
add:     exact h4
context:
del: -- [TABLET NODE: LargeComponentsSumBoundAsymptotics]
del:
del: theorem LargeComponentsSumBoundAsymptotics (p : ℕ → ℝ)
del:     (halpha : ∃ C : ℝ, ∀ᶠ (n : ℕ) in atTop, C ≤ ↑n * p n - Real.log ↑n) :
del:     Tendsto (fun n : ℕ => Real.exp 1 * ((n : ℝ) * p n) * Real.exp (- ((n : ℝ) * p n) / 2)) atTop (nhds 0) := by
del:   have h1 := tendsto_np_atTop p halpha
add:   have h1 := tendsto_np_atTop
context:   have h2 := tendsto_x_mul_exp_neg_half_x
context:   have h3 := h2.comp h1
context:   have h4 := Tendsto.const_mul (Real.exp 1) h3
workspace (/directory)
${TRELLIS_ROOT:-/path/to/trellis}/src/trellis/.trellis-smoke/connectivity-gnp-opusmax-theorem-geminipro-later branch
master sandbox
no sandbox /model
gemini-3.1-pro-preview quota
29% used
? Shell   rm -f Tablet/Test.lean Tablet/Test.tex Tablet/Test2.lean Tablet/Test2.tex

Allow execution of [1m[38;5;229m[rm][0m?
(checked) 1. Allow once
2. Allow for this session
3. No, suggest changes (esc)
